Index

A B C D E F G H I K L M O P R S T U W 
All Classes|All Packages

G

getAllPossibleDFATransitions() - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNode
Returns all reachable nodes of the DFA node.
getAlphabet() - Method in class alphabet.LanguageParameter
getAlphabet returns all characters in our alphabet.
getAlphabetSize() - Method in class alphabet.LanguageParameter
 
getDFATransition(char) - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNode
Returns the next node in the constructed Aho-Corasick DFA, note that this is different to getNextNode which returns the next node in the Trie.
getFail() - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNode
Gets the first node on the failure path starting from this node.
getFail() - Method in class trienodes.UkkonenTrieNode
Gets the first node on the failure path starting from this node.
getNextNode(char) - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNode
Returns the next node in the Aho-Corasick String Matcher Trie, note that this is different to getDFATransition.
getNextNode(char) - Method in class trienodes.UkkonenTrieNode
Returns the next node in the Aho-Corasick String Matcher Trie, note that this is different to getDFATransition.
getSCS() - Method in class ukkonenscsfinder.UkkonenSCSFinder
getSCS returns the SCS generated by Ukkonens algorithm.
getSuccessorNodes() - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNode
Utility method that returns all (even null) successors in the AC-Trie.
